ORDER FOR EXAMINATION AS TO DEFENDANT CHARLENE SOELTER, ON FEB-26-2015 OFF CALENDAR. STEVE BERLOWITZ, ESQ., APPEARING FOR JUDGMENT CREDITOR. SALLY J. ELKINGTON, ESQ.,SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR JUDGMENT DEBTOR. CHARLENE SOELTER SWORN AND EXAMINED ON HIS OWN BEHALF. PARTIES ON THE RECORD STIPULATED TO CONDUCT A TELEPHONIC EXAMINATION ON APRIL 6, 2015 AT 10:00 AM. COURT ORDERED DOCUMENTATION SUBJECT OF THE SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM TO BE PROVIDED NO LATER THAN 30 DAYS FROM THIS DAY. JUDGMENT CREDITOR'S REQUEST FOR JUDGMENT DEBTOR TO PAY FOR EXPENSES OF TELEPHONIC EXAMINATION ON APRIL 6, 2015 IS DENIED, COURT ORDERED EACH PARTY TO BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: MARY E. GALRLAND, CSR#4721. (415) 519 6084. (514)
